description:
# Open question

Pre-invoke return channel and field-conflict policy.

Pre-invoke returns:
- `field_overrides` — merged into command.field_changes
- `metadata_additions` — appended to commit message k:v block

Conflict policy when two plugins both write the same field:
- **Strict-error** (recommended): any double-write aborts the op
- **Last-writer-wins**: later plugins in chain order can clobber
- **Namespaced fields**: plugins only write under their own keyspace

Special case: `id`. Pre-invoke can assign the ball id (jira returns PROJ-1234). Only one plugin in the chain should claim that authority. Proposal: explicit `id_authority` config key naming the plugin. Default: balls generates one.

Spec the final rule and the failure messages.
title: Topic: pre-invoke return channel + field-conflict policy
